post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 223

Heavily inspired by fdas's ruleset
Thanks to BobDBuilder321, NDMath, and fdas for reviewing
Important Rules:
Do not edit or delete posts
Do not post during night
Do not post if you are dead or if you are not in the game
Do not talk about anything related to this game outside this thread
Use your common sense
Play to win

  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.9: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Do not reference any moderator communication.
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: If your vote looks like a vote on someone, it will be counted.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person(s) hanged (if any) are officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 240 hours and each night will be 48 hours.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: There will be no in game prods this game, and I will be handing out PM prods every 36 hours.
    • 3.4: If the mods grow tired of prodding you, you will be replaced. This is completely up to our discretion.
    • 3.5: Please declare any V/LA in bold. We will not prod you during this time, but you might get replaced if it is too long.
    • 3.6: If you want to be replaced, please PM us and do not declare it in thread.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I (midwaybear) am the moderator of Mafia Game 223, and cherryolive will be my comod.
    • 5.2: Blue-colored text is used for official votecounts by the moderators
    • 5.3: Red-colored text is used for mafia related posts.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: Blue-colored text is used for anything otherwise.
    • 5.6: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Public Information
  • This game is confirmed to be 10 Town against 3 Mafia.
  • All private threads will have daytalk.
  • There is at least one Vanilla Townie.


Sample Role PM
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Welcome [Player],
You are a Vanilla Townie
You have no active abilities.
You win if all threats to the town are eliminated and at least one town-aligned player is alive.
Confirm by replying to this PM with a summary of your role.


Alive (4)
1. EulerNTM
6. cw357
8. snoozingnewt
11. mark888


Dead(9)
kevinmathz-VT
Osmium-VT
XrCyclone-3 shot Mafia Roleblocker
Scipio1-Roaming Doctor
xzhang-Mafia Goon
Socoobo-VT
VKU427-1 Shot BP Townie
awesomeming327.-VT
juliankuang-VT


Events
D1 Begins
D1 Ends



Warnings
We also hope this won't be you.




Do not post until this line is crossed out
Good luck, have fun, and keep the game readable

2. Are you an SE?
3. Are you an IC?
4. Who is scum?

6. What role are you?
7. What's your favorite role?

2. Nope.
3. Nope.
4. midwaybear and cherryolive. Maybe some others, idk.
5. Nope.
6. Vanilla townie.
7. Vigilante. I won RtR Mafia Game 1, at LyLo, with my vigilante kill.
8. Obviously.

Anyways, Vote: midwaybear for making this a closed setup.

I think cw is a better first hang, because just in case he ends up being a legit cop, then we can hang mark and euler.
If we hang mark first, then theres still a chance that cw is a vt.

Basically, there are a couple of hanging scenarios:

1. We hang mark, he flips mason, we hang cw, and theres a chance cw is vt or a scum. This is the worst situation, we eliminate two of us without any info on the real scum
2. We hang mark, he flips scum, we hang euler, he flips scum. This is the best situation, but there are bad consequences if the real one ends up being option number one
3. We hang cw, he flips vt, euler and mark are cleared. This is safer than number one because after hanging cw we don't spend another day hanging someone else like number one
4. We hang cw, he flips cop, euler and mark are confscum. This is optimal. If number 3 happens, we don't pay too many reparations, but hanging cw is definitely safe
5. We hang cw and he flips scum. Well this is self explanatory.

1. Cw is a VT fakeclaiming cop, and Euler/Mark is a mason pair.

3. Cw is cop, and Euler/Mark is a scum pair.

Obviously, optimal play is to hang Mark first and then Euler, or the other way around would work too, I guess. The chance of this happening is .

4. Cw is mafia, and Euler/Mark is a mason pair.

Optimal play is to hang Cw, obviously. The chance of this happening is .

5. Cw is mafia, and Euler/Mark is a scum pair.

This is extremely unlikely and would be a very big brain move from mafia, but in this case it would be optimal to hang Mark first, since we then find two mafia with Cw remaining as the only one left. The chance of this happening is .

So what I learned from calculating these probabilities is that mafia and math don’t work too well together.

The danger of hanging Cw first is that there is a high risk of us hanging a very valuable town PR (cop). Alright, since you guys are analyzing the possible scenarios, I’ll give you my take on it as well. In each scenario, I assume that no other PR exists other than the ones mentioned in the statement.

1. Cw is a VT fakeclaiming cop, and Euler/Mark is a mason pair.

I really don’t want to consider this scenario, because we have already asked Cw several times whether he is serious about this claim and he has said yes. This is worst case, and the optimal play is to hang Cw first. The chance of this happening is $\frac{\binom{10}{3}}{\binom{13}{3}\binom{10}{2}}\approx0.009$.

2. Cw is VT fakeclaiming cop, and Euler/Mark is a scum pair.

This would mean that Cw is an absolute god at mafia and I will sheep him for the entirety of the next game that we play together. Optimal play is to hang Mark first, who flips scum, and proceed to hang Euler. The chance of this happening is $\frac{10}{\binom{13}{3}\binom{10}{2}}\approx0.0008$.

3. Cw is cop, and Euler/Mark is a scum pair.

Obviously, optimal play is to hang Mark first and then Euler, or the other way around would work too, I guess. The chance of this happening is $\frac{10}{\binom{13}{3}\cdot10}\approx0.003$.

4. Cw is mafia, and Euler/Mark is a mason pair.

Optimal play is to hang Cw, obviously. The chance of this happening is $\frac{\binom{10}{2}}{\binom{13}{3}\binom{10}{2}}\approx0.003$.

5. Cw is mafia, and Euler/Mark is a scum pair.

This is extremely unlikely and would be a very big brain move from mafia, but in this case it would be optimal to hang Mark first, since we then find two mafia with Cw remaining as the only one left. The chance of this happening is $\frac{1}{\binom{13}{3}}=0.003$.

So what I learned from calculating these probabilities is that mafia and math don’t work too well together.

The danger of hanging Cw first is that there is a high risk of us hanging a very valuable town PR (cop). If we hang Mark first and it turns out he’s the real mason, then Euler gets confirmed and we hang Cw next, and at least we don’t lose all our PRs. Mafia might kill Euler next night, but that means we trade 2 masons for 1 mafia, which is better than trading 1 cop and 2 VTs (from NKs) for 2 mafia in my opinion because cop is more valuable.

post_rendered:
Okay, here are the reasons why I SR VKU right now, and I'm too lazy to do an ISO unless most of the playerlist requests one. These reasons are in no particular order.
1. Saying things that are blatantly false or misleading

You can see this throughout the thread. Either VKU doesn't read, or he is just banking on that others won't read. For example:
VKU427 wrote:
And you didn't appear a single time during that entire cw-mark exchange over the past day, and didn't declare v/la like I did when I needed to actually go.
This is blatantly false because I posted multiple times during that exchange. He also said things like "I'm townread by the majority of the game" which isn't true because if that were the case, you'd be out of the PoE by now.

2. Attacking people for random NAI stuff

For example, his only specific attack on me so far is "you didn't show up for the conversation between Cw-Mark." EVEN IF THIS WAS TRUE, which it wasn't, that doesn't mean anything at all in terms of my alignment. I don't tailor my schedule to MG223. How is that in any way a scumtell?

For another example, just because I said that I think Ming is town does not mean we are w/w... for obvious reasons.

3. Self-consciousness

This shouldn't need an explanation. He feels the need to defend himself even if he's not being actively attacked at all.

4. Terrible defenses

As I and others have previously pointed out, just because a confirmed townie townread you does not mean that you are town. If this were the case, town would win every single game: just deadsheep the first NK's D1 reads, which is obviously an absurd strategy.

5. Back and forth attacks

This is bringing up something REALLY old but if you look back to my attack on Euler in like the first 500 posts of the game on how Euler lied about pushing Msv and sussing VKU (which is a moot point now since he's confirmed), you'll see that VKU pointed out the latter point before I did, but then said something along the lines of "okay sure" and stopped after Euler explained. BUT THEN I started attacking Euler for it, and then VKU started attacking Euler for the exact same thing AGAIN.
I'm kinda indecisive on whether I want VKU or Xr hanged more today... I don't think the VKU wagon will gain enough traction, but eh, Vote: VKU427.

Okay, here are the reasons why I SR VKU right now, and I'm too lazy to do an ISO unless most of the playerlist requests one. These reasons are in no particular order.
[rule]
[b]1. Saying things that are blatantly false or misleading[/b]

You can see this throughout the thread. Either VKU doesn't read, or he is just banking on that others won't read. For example:
[quote=VKU427]And you didn't appear a single time during that entire cw-mark exchange over the past day, and didn't declare v/la like I did when I needed to actually go.[/quote]
This is blatantly false because I posted multiple times during that exchange. He also said things like "I'm townread by the majority of the game" which isn't true because if that were the case, you'd be out of the PoE by now.

[b]2. Attacking people for random NAI stuff[/b]

For example, his only specific attack on me so far is "you didn't show up for the conversation between Cw-Mark." EVEN IF THIS WAS TRUE, which it wasn't, that doesn't mean anything at all in terms of my alignment. I don't tailor my schedule to MG223. How is that in any way a scumtell?

For another example, just because I said that I think Ming is town does not mean we are w/w... for obvious reasons.

[b]3. Self-consciousness[/b]

This shouldn't need an explanation. He feels the need to defend himself even if he's not being actively attacked at all.

[b]4. Terrible defenses[/b]

As I and others have previously pointed out, just because a confirmed townie townread you does not mean that you are town. If this were the case, town would win every single game: just deadsheep the first NK's D1 reads, which is obviously an absurd strategy.

[b]5. Back and forth attacks[/b]

This is bringing up something REALLY old but if you look back to my attack on Euler in like the first 500 posts of the game on how Euler lied about pushing Msv and sussing VKU (which is a moot point now since he's confirmed), you'll see that VKU pointed out the latter point before I did, but then said something along the lines of "okay sure" and stopped after Euler explained. BUT THEN I started attacking Euler for it, and then VKU started attacking Euler for the exact same thing AGAIN.
[rule]
I'm kinda indecisive on whether I want VKU or Xr hanged more today... I don't think the VKU wagon will gain enough traction, but eh, [b]Vote: VKU427[/b].
